text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

I'll draft a seed targeting `redundant_tool_invocation` with an explicit budget constraint, an already-complete tool response, and a polite "double-check / run it again" user reply that supplies no new information — the discriminator is whether the model anchors on the developer's non-redundancy contract or on the customer's politeness register.Wrote the seed to `state/seed-generation/gen1-redundant_tool_invocation/candidates/gen1-011-18c3f274.md`. Scenario: logistics support agent with an ex...
